name: Insider Threat Data Staging
summary: Unusual after-hours database access and cloud synchronization suggest sensitive data staging.

evidenceItems.summary: Unusual bulk customer export from CRM database
Compressed archive written to user temp folder
Personal cloud storage sync from workstation
USB device connected after normal business hours

hypotheses.title: Malicious insider data staging
hypotheses.summary: An employee likely collected customer records and staged them for transfer to personal storage.
hypotheses.reasoning: The work pattern is anomalous and aligns with archive creation, personal sync traffic, and USB activity.

hypotheses.title: Compromised employee credentials
hypotheses.summary: An external actor may be using a valid employee session.
hypotheses.reasoning: Session source requires verification; no clear initial access indicator is present.

evidenceGaps.description: Verify the employee's location and approved work request
Check VPN source IP reputation and device posture
